other_observers: Bill Prather; No. Many observers had seen this bird previously
specific_location: County Line Rd 0.1 mi south of CO Hwy 66
description: Robin-sized and shaped. Orange on throat and upper chest, and mid-belly. Buff-colored eye-brow; black eye and black bill; bill longer and more slender than American Robin. Head otherwise gray-brown. Crown and nape browner; mantle gray but browner in the center. Wings dark gray with buffy-orange tips to greater and median coverts, forming two wing-bars; also broad buff-orange tips to primary covers and secondaries; hint of scaling on sides; extensive gray on lower flanks.Behaviors: Hopping on ground like American Robin.Call: none heardPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: n komar, n komar, n komar
